headline.purpose: Major landing sections and release-positioning statements.

title.purpose: Readable section headings, form labels, and primary controls.

body.purpose: Dense app copy, metadata, and supporting landing text.

label.purpose: Command hints, eyebrows, status text, and metadata strings.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Command Palette and modal-like command surfaces only.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Fast button, row, and hover feedback.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Panel, overlay, and command surface state changes.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Respect prefers-reduced-motion by collapsing animation and transition duration.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid command action used for the public signup and major app commands.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { min-height: 50px; padding: 0 20px; border: 1px solid var(--blue, #7aa2f7); border-radius: var(--radius, 4px); background: var(--blue, #7aa2f7); color: var(--bg, #08080c); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; } .ds-button-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.04); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--orange, #e0af68); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Email Field
components.description: Readable public-site input with app-token colors and product-grade focus behavior.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 10px; color: var(--text, #e0e0e0); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 650; } .ds-input { min-height: 50px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid var(--field-border, #30324a); border-radius: var(--radius, 4px); background: var(--surface, #0c0c12); color: var(--text, #e0e0e0); font: inherit; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--placeholder, #8a8da3); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--orange, #e0af68); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Product Frame
components.description: A quiet frame for actual Cull app state, not a decorative marketing card.
components.css: .ds-product-frame { margin: 0; border: 1px solid var(--border, #1a1a2e); border-radius: var(--radius, 4px); background: var(--surface, #0c0c12); overflow: hidden; } .ds-product-surface { display: grid; min-height: 180px; place-items: center; color: var(--text-secondary, #7a7fa0); font-family: var(--font, JetBrains Mono, ui-monospace, monospace); font-size: 13px; }

components.name: Decision Chip Accept
components.css: .ds-chip-accept { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 22px; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: var(--radius, 4px); background: var(--green, #9ece6a); color: var(--bg, #08080c); font-family: var(--font, JetBrains Mono, ui-monospace, monospace); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Decision Chip Reject
components.css: .ds-chip-reject { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 22px; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: var(--radius, 4px); background: var(--red, #f7768e); color: var(--bg, #08080c); font-family: var(--font, JetBrains Mono, ui-monospace, monospace); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Command Palette Surface
components.description: Dense transient command surface for fuzzy search, shortcuts, and recent commands.
components.html:
Search commands
Import folderCmd K
components.css: .ds-command-palette { width: 360px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #1a1a2e); border-radius: var(--radius, 4px); background: var(--surface, #0c0c12); box-shadow: 0 24px 88px color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg, #08080c) 82%, transparent); color: var(--text, #e0e0e0); font-family: var(--font, JetBrains Mono, ui-monospace, monospace); font-size: 13px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-command-search { padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #1a1a2e); color: var(--text-secondary, #7a7fa0); } .ds-command-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding: 10px 12px; } .ds-command-row:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--blue, #7aa2f7) 10%, transparent); color: var(--blue, #7aa2f7); } .ds-command-row kbd { border: 1px solid var(--border, #1a1a2e); border-radius: var(--radius, 4px); padding: 2px 5px; color: var(--text-secondary, #7a7fa0); font: inherit; font-size: 11px; }

narrative.overview: Cull should feel like a serious desktop curation room: dark, quiet, precise, and built around the image archive rather than the brand chrome. The system borrows the discipline of a terminal, the patience of a photo contact sheet, and the command density of a macOS power tool. It is technical without becoming novelty developer cosplay.
keyCharacteristics: Dark Tokyo Night base, one-pixel rules, and minimal tonal layering.
Monospace-first app UI, with Geist reserved for landing-page hierarchy and signup readability.
8px spacing grid, 4px radius, and predictable keyboard-oriented surfaces.
Accent colors carry state: blue for command/focus, green for accept, amber for warning/rating, red for reject/error.
Image content and decision state are the main signal. Chrome stays quiet.

rules.name: The Semantic Accent Rule
rules.body: Blue, green, amber, purple, and red are state and command colors. They are not decoration.

rules.name: The One-Pixel Rule
rules.body: Dividers and frame borders are 1px. Do not thicken borders to create emphasis unless the element is a real focus or selection state.

rules.name: The No-Blob Rule
rules.body: Decorative gradient blobs, bokeh, and ambient color clouds are forbidden. Cull's atmosphere comes from dark surfaces, real images, and precise state colors.

rules.name: The Mono-With-Purpose Rule
rules.body: Use JetBrains Mono for app chrome, commands, metadata, status, and technical content. Do not use monospace as a lazy shorthand for every marketing heading or form control.

rules.name: The Sans-For-Reading Rule
rules.body: Use Geist when the user needs to quickly parse a large heading, form label, or action. The header and signup block must never regress to oversized mono text.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Transient Rule
rules.body: Resting panels, cards, images, sidebars, and controls do not use shadows. Shadows are reserved for temporary overlays that must float above the current task.

rules.name: The Surface-Not-Card Rule
rules.body: Avoid marketing-style cards. Use full-width bands, rows, panels, or framed tools. Cards are allowed only for repeated items or modal surfaces where framing is functional.

dos: Do keep the image archive as the main content. Chrome should help users inspect, compare, and decide without competing for attention.
Do make local-first trust visible through clear copy, file/state language, and confirmation flows.
Do use Command Blue for focus, links, and primary commands; Accept Green for accepted/success states; Reject Red for failure/rejection.
Do preserve keyboard flow. Major actions should be reachable without a mouse and legible in the Command Palette.
Do use the 8px grid and 4px radius. Small deviations need a local reason, such as the logo asset.
Do keep signup and confirmation copy concrete: what happens next, what is safe, and what the user controls.
Do keep all interactive targets at least 44px in both dimensions when they are clickable or touchable.
Do use real Cull product imagery or app-state renders on the public site.
donts: Don't make Cull look or sound like generic SaaS.
Don't use corporate AI boosterism, privacy fear marketing, cute onboarding, or vague productivity software language.
Don't add decorative gradient blobs, glassmorphism, rounded marketing cards everywhere, clinical feature grids, or noisy animations.
Don't write copy that explains obvious UI mechanics.
Don't dilute the terminal-inspired, monospace-first app UI with unrelated type, color, or component patterns.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe card accents, or hero metric templates.
Don't use color as decoration. Accent colors must map to command, state, metadata, warning, success, or rejection.
Don't reintroduce old ImageView naming, stale 0px-radius guidance, or source-available positioning. Cull is Apache-2.0 open source.
